home.meta.title: Artkiv - Your Passion, Perfectly Organized
home.meta.description: Artkiv - Your passion deserves better organization! Perfect for artisans, collectors, small businesses, and hobbyists. Organize collections, track every sale, and master your finances—all offline!
home.hero.description: Whether you're an artisan creating handmade treasures, a collector curating valuable items, a small business owner, or someone with a hobby that makes money—Artkiv is your all-in-one command center! Organize every piece, track every sale, master your finances, and watch your passion thrive. 100% offline, 100% yours.
home.features.title: Everything you need to turn your passion into profit
home.features.description: Whether you sell handmade jewelry, collect vintage items, run a small craft business, or manage any archive— every feature is designed to help you stay organized and financially savvy.
home.features.smartArchive.title: Smart Archive
home.features.smartArchive.description: Catalog every piece in your collection—pottery, paintings, vintage watches, handmade crafts, or any treasure! Add photos, tags, and details. Find anything instantly.
home.features.salesTracking.title: Sales Tracking That Works
home.features.salesTracking.description: Record every sale instantly—whether it's at a craft fair, online, or in your shop. See exactly what's making you money and watch your revenue grow with beautiful charts.
home.features.realProfit.title: Know Your Real Profit
home.features.realProfit.description: Track materials, shipping, tools, and every business expense. Instantly see your true profit margins— no more guessing if you're actually making money!
home.features.offline.title: 100% Offline
home.features.offline.description: Your data stays on your device. No cloud, no subscriptions needed for core features. Your data, your privacy.
home.features.analytics.title: Visual Analytics
home.features.analytics.description: Watch your passion pay off! Beautiful charts show revenue trends, best-sellers, monthly performance— turning numbers into insights that help you grow.
home.features.secure.title: Secure & Private
home.features.secure.description: Protect your data with biometric authentication and passcode lock. Your valuable collections stay secure.
home.about.title: Built by someone who gets it
home.about.description: Artkiv was born from frustration—trying to manage a growing collection while tracking sales felt like juggling chaos. No more spreadsheets, no expensive software, no hassle. Just simple, powerful organization.
home.about.whyArtkiv.title: Why Artkiv?
home.about.whyArtkiv.description: Ever tried using spreadsheets to track your inventory and sales? Frustrating, right? Or paid for expensive business software that's way too complicated? Artkiv cuts through the noise—simple, powerful, and works anywhere without internet. Perfect for makers, sellers, and collectors who just want things to work.
home.about.ourPromise.title: Our Promise
home.about.ourPromise.description: Your business data belongs to YOU—not in some cloud that could disappear tomorrow. Artkiv works 100% offline. No forced accounts, no sneaky data collection, no monthly fees for basic features. Download it, own it, use it forever. Simple as that.
home.premium.title: Unlock the Full Potential
home.premium.description: Upgrade to Premium and enjoy unlimited access, zero distractions, and exclusive features to supercharge your workflow.
home.premium.goSubtitle: Remove all limitations and elevate your business management
home.premium.noAds.title: No Ads, Ever
home.premium.noAds.description: Experience Artkiv without any interruptions. A completely clean, distraction-free interface dedicated to your collections.
home.premium.unlimited.title: Unlimited Everything
home.premium.unlimited.description: No limits on items, transactions, or sales records. Archive your entire collection and every transaction without restrictions.
home.premium.backups.title: Unlimited Backups
home.premium.backups.description: Create as many backups as you need, whenever you want. Your data is precious—protect it with unlimited backup capabilities.
home.premium.earlyAccess.title: Early Access
home.premium.earlyAccess.description: Be the first to experience new features. Get exclusive early access to updates before they're available to everyone.
home.premium.joinDescription: Choose Premium to unlock the full potential. Cancel anytime, no questions asked.
home.cta.title: Ready to transform chaos into success?
home.cta.description: Join artisans, collectors, and small business owners who've ditched the spreadsheets and found their perfect organizational companion. Your passion deserves better—download Artkiv today!
support.meta.title: Support - Artkiv
support.meta.description: Get help with Artkiv - Your questions answered! Perfect for artisans, collectors, and small businesses.
support.header.title: Help & Support
support.header.subtitle: Everything you need to make the most of Artkiv—we're here to help!
support.gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
support.gettingStarted.content:
Welcome to Artkiv! Here's everything you need to know to get started organizing your passion.

What is Artkiv?

Artkiv is the perfect companion for artisans, collectors, small business owners, and hobbyists who want to organize their collections AND track the finances behind them. It helps you:

  • Archive your items - Store photos, descriptions, and metadata for everything you create, collect, or sell
  • Track every sale - Record transactions, buyers, and earnings with ease
  • Manage expenses - Monitor supplies, materials, and business costs to know your real profit
  • Analyze performance - Beautiful charts and reports show how your passion is paying off

Key Features

  • 100% Offline - All data is stored locally on your device. No internet required—work anywhere!
  • Privacy-Focused - Your data never leaves your device. We don't collect any personal information. Ever.
  • Secure - Protect your archive with biometric authentication or passcode.
  • Beautiful & Intuitive - Modern design that makes organizing your passion actually enjoyable!

Who is Artkiv For?

  • Artisans & Makers - Track handmade jewelry, pottery, crafts, and custom creations
  • Collectors - Organize vintage items, coins, memorabilia, or any curated collection
  • Small Business Owners - Manage inventory and finances for your shop or online store
  • Hobbyists & Side Hustlers - Turn your passion project into a profitable venture
support.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
support.faq.a1: Yes! Artkiv is free to download and use with all the essential features. The free version is perfect for getting started with your collection management. We offer a Premium subscription that unlocks unlimited items, removes ads, and gives you unlimited backups—but you can use the core app forever without paying a dime!
support.faq.q2: Does Artkiv require an internet connection?
support.faq.a2: No! Artkiv is designed to work completely offline. Perfect for craft fairs, markets, or anywhere without reliable internet. All your data stays on your device. You only need internet if you choose to view ads (free version) or manage your Premium subscription.
support.faq.a3: Absolutely! Your data never leaves your device. We don't have servers that store your items, transactions, or any personal information. You can also protect access to Artkiv with biometric authentication (Face ID, Touch ID, fingerprint) or a passcode.
support.faq.a4: Artkiv is available for both iOS and Android (Coming Soon) devices. It's optimized for phones but also works great on tablets.
support.faq.q5: How do I backup my data?
support.faq.a5:
Since Artkiv stores data locally, your data is included in your device's standard backup:

  • iOS: Enable iCloud Backup in Settings > [Your Name] > iCloud > iCloud Backup
  • Android: Use Google Backup in Settings > System > Backup

We strongly recommend keeping regular backups to prevent data loss.
support.faq.q6: Can I transfer data to a new device?
support.faq.a6: Yes! When you restore your new device from a backup, your Artkiv data will be transferred automatically. For iOS, use iCloud or iTunes backup. For Android, use Google Backup or transfer tools provided by your device manufacturer.
support.faq.q7: What happens if I uninstall the app?
support.faq.a7: Important: Uninstalling Artkiv will delete all data stored by the app on your device. Make sure you have a device backup before uninstalling if you want to preserve your data.
support.faq.a8:
Premium subscription includes:

  • Ad-free experience - Zero distractions, pure productivity
  • Unlimited everything - Items, transactions, and sales records without limits
  • Unlimited backups - Protect your data as often as you want
  • Priority access - Get new features first!

All this for just €1.49/month—less than a coffee! ☕
support.faq.q9: How do I cancel my subscription?
support.faq.a9:
You can manage your subscription through your device settings:

  • iOS: Settings > [Your Name] > Subscriptions > Artkiv
  • Android: Google Play Store > Menu > Subscriptions > Artkiv

Canceling will stop future charges, but you'll keep Premium access until the end of your billing period.
support.faq.q10: How do I request a refund?
support.faq.a10:
Refunds are processed by Apple or Google, not directly by us. To request a refund:

  • iOS: Visit reportaproblem.apple.com
  • Android: Visit Google Play Help Center
support.faq.q11: The app is running slowly. What can I do?
support.faq.a11:
Try these steps to improve performance:

  • Close other apps running in the background
  • Restart the app
  • Restart your device
  • Make sure you have the latest version of Artkiv installed
  • Ensure your device has sufficient storage space
support.faq.q12: Images are not loading properly. How can I fix this?
support.faq.a12:
If images aren't displaying correctly:

  • Check that you've granted Artkiv permission to access your photos
  • Restart the app
  • Make sure your device has enough storage space
  • Try reimporting the affected images
support.faq.q13: I forgot my passcode. How do I recover access?
support.faq.a13: If you've set up biometric authentication (Face ID, Touch ID, fingerprint), try using that to access the app. Unfortunately, if you've forgotten your passcode and cannot use biometrics, the only option may be to reinstall the app, which will delete your data. This is why we recommend keeping regular device backups.
